info.title: SPL Private Payments API
info.description:
REST API for building private SPL token transactions on Solana and MagicBlock ephemeral rollups.

Documentation: https://docs.magicblock.gg/pages/private-ephemeral-rollups-pers/how-to-guide/quickstart

cluster.description: Optional. Use `mainnet` for BASE_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_RPC_URL, `devnet` for BASE_DEVNET_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_DEVNET_RPC_URL, or provide a custom http(s) RPC URL to override the base RPC while keeping the configured ephemeral RPC.

mint.description: Optional. Defaults to Solana USDC on mainnet: EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v. On devnet it defaults to devnet USDC: 4zMMC9srt5Ri5X14GAgXhaHii3GnPAEERYPJgZJDncDU.

amount.description: Base-unit amount as an integer JSON value with minimum 1.

validator.description: Optional. Defaults to the selected ephemeral RPC identity resolved via `getIdentity`.

cluster.description: Optional. Use `mainnet` for BASE_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_RPC_URL, `devnet` for BASE_DEVNET_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_DEVNET_RPC_URL, or provide a custom http(s) RPC URL to override the base RPC while keeping the configured ephemeral RPC.

amount.description: Base-unit amount as an integer JSON value with minimum 1.

validator.description: Optional. Defaults to the selected ephemeral RPC identity resolved via `getIdentity`.

cluster.description: Optional. Use `mainnet` for BASE_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_RPC_URL, `devnet` for BASE_DEVNET_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_DEVNET_RPC_URL, or provide a custom http(s) RPC URL to override the base RPC while keeping the configured ephemeral RPC.

validator.description: Optional. Defaults to the selected ephemeral RPC identity resolved via `getIdentity`.

cluster.description: Optional. Use `mainnet` for BASE_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_RPC_URL, `devnet` for BASE_DEVNET_RPC_URL and EPHEMERAL_DEVNET_RPC_URL, or provide a custom http(s) RPC URL to override the base RPC while keeping the configured ephemeral RPC.

amount.description: Base-unit amount as an integer JSON value with minimum 1.

validator.description: Optional. When this transfer route needs a validator and none is provided, the API resolves it from the selected ephemeral RPC via `getIdentity`.

memo.description: Optional. Appends a final Memo Program instruction with this UTF-8 message.

minDelayMs.description: Optional. Private transfer only. Defaults to 0.

maxDelayMs.description: Optional. Private transfer only. Defaults to 0 when omitted, or to minDelayMs when minDelayMs is set.

clientRefId.description: Optional. Private transfer only. Encrypted client reference ID that can be used to confirm a payment.

split.description: Optional. Private transfer only. Defaults to 1. Must be between 1 and 15.

legacy.description: Optional. Defaults to false. When true, skips lookup-table compilation and returns a legacy transaction.

privateTransfer.description: Present when visibility=private. Diagnostic metadata about the appended schedule_private_transfer instruction.

userPublicKey.description: Public key of the wallet that will sign the swap transaction.

payer.description: Optional fee payer for transaction fees and rent.

wrapAndUnwrapSol.description: Automatically wrap and unwrap native SOL when needed.

useSharedAccounts.description: Allow shared accounts for intermediate routing state.

feeAccount.description: Optional initialized token account used to collect platform fees.

trackingAccount.description: Optional public key used for downstream transaction tracking.

prioritizationFeeLamports.description: Optional priority fee configuration or fixed lamport amount.

asLegacyTransaction.description: Build a legacy transaction instead of a versioned one.

destinationTokenAccount.description: Optional destination token account for the output mint.

nativeDestinationAccount.description: Optional destination account for native SOL output.

dynamicComputeUnitLimit.description: Estimate compute usage and set the compute unit limit automatically.

skipUserAccountsRpcCalls.description: Skip extra RPC checks for required user accounts.

dynamicSlippage.description: Let the upstream swap builder overwrite slippage on the transaction.

computeUnitPriceMicroLamports.description: Optional exact compute unit price in micro-lamports.

blockhashSlotsToExpiry.description: Optional transaction expiry window in slots.

visibility.description: Public swap (default) proxies Jupiter/Metis as-is. `private` forces Jupiter's output into a program-owned stash ATA and appends a scheduled private transfer.

destination.description: Final private-transfer recipient (wallet pubkey). Required when visibility=private.

minDelayMs.description: Earliest (ms) the queued transfer may settle. Required when visibility=private.

maxDelayMs.description: Latest (ms) the queued transfer may settle. Required when visibility=private.

split.description: Number of queue entries to split the transfer across. Required when visibility=private. Must be between 1 and 14.

clientRefId.description: Optional u64 client correlation id attached to each queued split.

validator.description: Optional validator pubkey for the transfer-queue PDA. Defaults to the well-known MagicBlock validator.

content.text: Built an unsigned SPL deposit transaction.

post.description: Deposit SPL tokens from Solana into an ephemeral rollup.
Withdraw SPL tokens from an ephemeral rollup back to Solana.
Build an unsigned base-chain transaction that initializes and delegates a validator-scoped transfer queue for a mint.
Transfer SPL tokens publicly or privately trough an ephemeral rollup.

post.description:
Build an unsigned swap transaction from a quote.

Supports two visibility modes:

- **`visibility: "public"`** (default) — pure pass-through to the Jupiter/Metis
  upstream. The returned transaction is whatever the upstream produces.
- **`visibility: "private"`** — the server forces Jupiter's output into a
  program-owned stash ATA (deterministically derived from `(userPublicKey,
  quoteResponse.outputMint)`), prepends an idempotent ATA-create, and appends a
  `schedule_private_transfer` instruction that registers a one-shot Hydra
  crank. When the crank fires, it self-CPIs into the on-chain private-transfer
  flow to deliver the swapped tokens to `destination` with the requested
  delay/split policy. The returned transaction is a v0 `VersionedTransaction`
  that is still unsigned — the client signs and submits.

When `visibility = "private"`, the fields `destination`, `minDelayMs`,
`maxDelayMs`, and `split` are **required**. `clientRefId` and `validator` are
optional. Explicitly setting `destinationTokenAccount` to anything other than
the server-derived stash ATA returns 400.

private.description: Forces Jupiter's output into the program-owned stash ATA and appends schedule_private_transfer.

400.description: Invalid request (missing or conflicting private-transfer fields)

content.text: Built an unsigned SPL deposit transaction.

202.description: Notification accepted; no response body is returned.

400.description: Invalid JSON or invalid JSON-RPC request

error.message: Unsupported Media Type: Content-Type must be application/json
